# terrible_async_status (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `jid` (String) Job or task identifier

### Optional

- `mode` (String) If V(status), obtain the status. If V(cleanup), clean up the async job cache (by default in C(~/.ansible_async/)) for the specified job O(jid), without waiting for it to finish.

### Read-Only

- `ansible_job_id` (String) The asynchronous job id
- `erased` (String) Path to erased job file
- `finished` (Boolean) Whether the asynchronous job has finished or not
- `result` (String) Full raw JSON result from Ansible
- `started` (Boolean) Whether the asynchronous job has started or not
- `stderr` (String) Any errors returned by async_wrapper
- `stdout` (String) Any output returned by async_wrapper
